documentation.content:
## 🚨 IAM Security Alert

A permission grant has been detected for one of the monitored users.

### Event Details:
* **Granted by (Actor):** `${log.extracted_label.actor}`
* **Granted to (Principal):** `${log.extracted_label.principal}`
* **Role detected:** `${log.extracted_label.rol}` (Note: only the first detected role is shown here)
* **Target Resource:** `${log.extracted_label.recurso}`

### 🔍 Action Required:
Multiple roles might have been assigned in this single operation. 
[**VIEW FULL AUDIT LOG DETAILS**](https://console.cloud.google.com/logs/query;query=insertId%3D%22${log.extracted_label.log_id}%22?project=pg-gccoe-daniel-sanjuan)

Please verify if this action was expected.
